MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes, Inc. is present.
Attorney David John Briggs appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Seville Trotter is present.
Attorney Nelsonya Causby representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per plaintiff's attorney.

The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
